title: Refactor DIP-023 (DIP): Direct instantiation of concrete UTF8Writer.
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.reasoning: The _createWriter method directly instantiates UTF8Writer, coupling the factory to a specific implementation of the Writer abstraction instead of allowing for the injection of different writer types.

fix_logic.summary: Introduce a factory method for creating UTF8Writer to decouple TextualTSFactory from the concrete implementation.
fix_logic.rationale: By moving the instantiation of UTF8Writer into a protected factory method, we allow subclasses to override the creation logic, adhering to the Dependency Inversion Principle.
